race.description: Luxury Abounds At Oak Tree Cg&E Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: STORM MERCHANT (6) knocked up late from the sticky draw when he went forward to finish third over 1000m at Grafton. Expected to have come on strongly for this and gets every chance from the gate. FALL FOR AUTUMN (12) back in trip in the heavy conditions with a battling second over 1200m at this track. Fitter now and well placed in this line-up. BONDI PROPHET (11) is in career-best form and will relish the weight drop on the quick back-up. Adept in all conditions and capable of testing this field. SUPER JAIE (10) gave a good account of himself in stronger company when he closed late to finish third over 1400m at Grafton in BM66 class. Each-way. The chances don't end there.
